mapper.select: select reportid, phase, aprvlineid, approvalid, report_type, date_from, date_to, val1, val2, val3, DATE_FORMAT(apply_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as apply_date, apply_userid, DATE_FORMAT(approve_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as approve_date, approve_userid from cotdl.tbl_piireport order by reportid
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piireport (reportid, phase, aprvlineid, approvalid, report_type, date_from, date_to, val1, val2, val3, apply_date, apply_userid, approve_date, approve_userid) values (#{reportid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{report_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{date_from, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{date_to, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{apply_userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, #{approve_userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_piireport (reportid, phase, aprvlineid, approvalid, report_type, date_from, date_to, val1, val2, val3, apply_date, apply_userid, approve_date, approve_userid) values (#{reportid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{report_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{date_from, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{date_to, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{val3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{apply_userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, null, #{approve_userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piireport set phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aprvlineid= #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approvalid= #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, report_type= #{report_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, date_from= str_to_date(#{date_from, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m'), date_to= str_to_date(#{date_to, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m'), val1= #{val1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val2= #{val2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, val3= #{val3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, apply_date= str_to_date(#{apply_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), apply_userid= #{apply_userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approve_date= str_to_date(#{approve_date, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), approve_userid= #{approve_userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where reportid= #{reportid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select reportid, phase, aprvlineid, approvalid, report_type, date_from, date_to, val1, val2, val3, DATE_FORMAT(apply_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as apply_date, apply_userid, DATE_FORMAT(approve_date,'%Y/%m/%d') as approve_date, approve_userid from cotdl.tbl_piireport
order by reportid limit #{offset}, #{amount}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piireport set phase= 'APPROVING', apply_date = NOW() where reportid= #{reportid}
update cotdl.tbl_piireport set phase= 'APPROVED', approve_date= NOW() where reportid= #{reportid}
